doc_title: Illinois Forcible Entry and Detainer Act — 5-Day Notice
label: partial
reason: The 5-day notice and core service methods reflect real 735 ILCS 5/9-209, but the email-consent language and "conformed text 2024" framing appear paraphrased or invented rather than verbatim statutory text.
